summary: Offline-only review packet for public PP&D source recrawl candidates.

candidate_preflight_rows.robots_decision_placeholder: Reviewer must record robots result before processor handoff.
candidate_preflight_rows.policy_decision_placeholder: Reviewer must record PP&D allowlist and policy decision before processor handoff.
processor_handoff_dry_run_prerequisites: Run PP&D-local policy preflight in dry-run mode.
Confirm processor handoff manifest plan contains metadata-only output references.
candidate_preflight_rows.raw_body_persistence_exclusion_check: No raw response body may be persisted in committed artifacts.
candidate_preflight_rows.download_exclusion_check: No downloaded documents may be committed from this preflight packet.
candidate_preflight_rows.reviewer_approval_placeholder: Pending named reviewer approval before any handoff.
